name: Is it illegal for my employer to pressure me not to file comp in Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: Is it illegal for my employer to pressure me not to file comp in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, coercion or harassment violates Utah Code §34A-2-114, fines up to $5,000.[1] Key factors: Document interactions; report to Labor Commission.[1] Protections strong.[2] File anyway for rights.[1]
